summary: Iteration 189: Verified Stripe removal and PayID-only payment flow. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Stripe checkout endpoint returns 404 (removed). PayID create-reference and verify endpoints work correctly. Frontend: All pages load, emergent badge hidden via CSS, /payment-success redirects to /dashboard, no Stripe/Card references in PaymentModal. Mobile responsiveness verified at 375px viewport.

minor.issue: Had undefined _REVENUE_ENV variable reference (Stripe leftover) - FIXED by removing revenue section from validate_env_status()

critical_code_review_comments: Stripe completely removed: No stripe*.py files in backend, no stripe references in frontend
PayID-only payment flow working: create-reference returns valid reference, verify endpoint exists
Emergent badge hidden via CSS: #emergent-badge { display: none !important; } in index.css
/payment-success route redirects to /dashboard via Navigate component in App.js
PaymentModal.jsx shows only PayID option - no 'Pay by Card' button, no Stripe/CreditCard references
PaymentHistoryPage.jsx METHOD_CONFIG only has 'payid' method (Stripe removed)
Mobile responsiveness verified: Landing page, dashboard, case detail all render correctly at 375px
Fixed config.py: Removed undefined _REVENUE_ENV reference from validate_env_status()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe completely removed from codebase. PayID is the only payment method. All payment endpoints work: /api/payments/payid/create-reference, /api/payments/payid/verify, /api/payments/history, /api/payments/prices. Emergent badge hidden via CSS. Mobile responsiveness verified. Fixed config.py _REVENUE_ENV undefined variable bug.

features_tested.payid_create_reference_works: PASS - Returns valid reference, payid, amount
features_tested.payid_verify_exists: PASS - Endpoint exists and returns 404 for invalid reference
features_tested.no_stripe_frontend: PASS - No stripe/card references in page content
